THEPENITENT-BURDEN_POWER.title: Burden
THEPENITENT-ASHEN_EDICT_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you Ascend, apply [blue]1[/blue] Weak to a random enemy. Prophet: apply to ALL enemies instead.
THEPENITENT-ASHEN_EDICT_POWER.title: Ashen Edict
THEPENITENT-ASHEN_EDICT_ALL_ENEMIES_POWE: Whenever you Ascend, apply Weak to ALL enemies.
Whenever you Ascend, apply [blue]1[/blue] Weak to ALL enemies.
THEPENITENT-CROWN_OF_THORNS_POWER.descri: At the end of your turn, Heretic: consume half your Burden, rounded down, to gain that much Block.
THEPENITENT-CROWN_OF_THORNS_POWER.smartD: At the end of your turn, Heretic: consume half your [purple]Burden[/purple], rounded down, to gain that much [gold]Block[/gold].
THEPENITENT-CROWN_OF_THORNS_POWER.title: Crown of Thorns
THEPENITENT-FAITH_POWER.title: Faith
THEPENITENT-GRIM_CERTAINTY_POWER.descrip: Whenever your Descend creates Burden, deal damage to a random enemy.
THEPENITENT-GRIM_CERTAINTY_POWER.smartDe: Whenever your Descend creates Burden, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
THEPENITENT-GRIM_CERTAINTY_POWER.title: Grim Certainty
THEPENITENT-RITES_OF_ENDURANCE_POWER.des: The first time each turn you would lose HP from blockable damage, prevent it. Descend equal to the damage prevented.
THEPENITENT-RITES_OF_ENDURANCE_POWER.sma: The first time each turn you would lose HP from blockable damage, prevent it. Descend equal to the damage prevented.
THEPENITENT-ZEALOUS_RETORT_POWER.descrip: Whenever you are attacked while you have Faith, deal damage to the attacker. Prophet: deal 2 more damage.
THEPENITENT-ZEALOUS_RETORT_POWER.smartDe: Whenever you are attacked while you have Faith, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to the attacker. Prophet: deal 2 more damage.
THEPENITENT-ZEALOUS_RETORT_POWER.title: Zealous Retort
